controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india [disbursement of government pension by agency banks (abs)] directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India [Disbursement of
Government Pension by Agency Banks (ABs)] Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india [disbursement of government pension by agency banks (abs)] directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the abs which are authorized to disburse central government (cg) and state government (sg) pension
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to the ABs which are authorized to disburse
Central Government (CG) and State Government (SG) pension.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the abs which are authorized to disburse central government (cg) and state government (sg) pension

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'abs' means all public sector banks (psbs), scheduled private sector banks (pvbs), scheduled payments ba
controls.control_description:
In this Master Direction, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'ABs' means all Public Sector Banks (PSBs), scheduled Private Sector Banks
(PVBs), scheduled Payments Banks (PBs) and scheduled Small Finance Banks
(SFBs) appointed by RBI under Section 45 of the RBI, Act, 1934, by mutual
agreement, to carry out Government Banking business of CG / SGs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'abs' means all public sector banks (psbs), scheduled private sector banks (pvbs), scheduled payments ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure a biometric enabled digital service for pensioners of cg, sg or any other government organization
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) 'Jeevan Pramaan' means a biometric enabled digital service for pensioners of CG,
SG or any other Government organization.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a biometric enabled digital service for pensioners of cg, sg or any other government organization

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the applicable Acts, Rules / Regulations made thereunder, or any
statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, act expeditiously on the basis of copies of government orders provided by government to them through post, fax, e-mail, etc
controls.control_description:
ABs shall, therefore, act expeditiously on the basis of copies of
Government Orders provided by Government to them through post, fax, e-mail, etc.,
and/or by regularly accessing the Government websites.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, act expeditiously on the basis of copies of government orders provided by government to them through post, fax, e-mail, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure scrupulously follow all the orders contained in various notifications of government (central as well as states) and take necessary action immediately
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall scrupulously follow all the orders contained in various notifications of
Government (Central as well as States) and take necessary action immediately without
waiting for any further instructions from RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to scrupulously follow all the orders contained in various notifications of government (central as well as states) and take necessary action immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit the pension amount in the accounts of the pensioners based on the orders given by respective pension sanctioning authorities (psas)
controls.control_description:
The ABs shall credit the pension amount in the accounts of the pensioners based on
the orders given by respective Pension Sanctioning Authorities (PSAs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit the pension amount in the accounts of the pensioners based on the orders given by respective pension sanctioning authorities (psas)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected without the pensioner's knowledge and consent, or without the issuance of a prior notice
controls.control_description:
Chapter III - Recovery and Refund of Excess Pension Payment
The banks may ensure that no recovery of excess amount from the pension of a
Government employee shall be effected without the pensioner's knowledge and consent,
or without the issuance of a prior notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected without the pensioner's knowledge and consent, or without the issuance of a prior notice

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly conform to the applicable service rules and the principles discussed hereinabove
controls.control_description:
Further, any such recovery must strictly conform
to the applicable service rules and the principles discussed hereinabove.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly conform to the applicable service rules and the principles discussed hereinabove

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a letter of undertaking from the pensioner to the effect that in case any excess pension is credited to the account of the pensioner, the pension
controls.control_description:
The banks may take a Letter of Undertaking from the pensioner to the effect that in case
any excess pension is credited to the account of the pensioner, the pensioner is bound to
refund the same to the bank upon receipt of a suitable notice from the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a letter of undertaking from the pensioner to the effect that in case any excess pension is credited to the account of the pensioner, the pension

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the government account in lumpsum immediately on detection
controls.control_description:
(i) Whenever excess/wrongful pension payment is made to a pensioner due to bank-
attributed errors such as clerical errors, arithmetical miscalculations or incorrect
application of relevant instructions, the entire amount thereof should be credited to the
Government account in lumpsum immediately on detection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the government account in lumpsum immediately on detection

controls.control_objective: To ensure to follow for recovery of such excess /wrongful pension payments made to the pensioner, is given in annex iii
controls.control_description:
(ii) The broad procedure that the banks are required to follow for recovery of such
excess /wrongful pension payments made to the pensioner, is given in Annex III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to follow for recovery of such excess /wrongful pension payments made to the pensioner, is given in annex iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy on recovery of excess/wrongful pension payment made to the pensioners (including cut-off period beyond which no r
controls.control_description:
(iii) The banks shall put in place a Board-approved policy on recovery of
excess/wrongful pension payment made to the pensioners (including cut-off period
beyond which no recovery shall be made), issue appropriate operating
procedure/instructions, institute robust monitoring mechanism, and ensure their strict
compliance).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy on recovery of excess/wrongful pension payment made to the pensioners (including cut-off period beyond which no r

controls.control_objective: To ensure make recoveries based on the instructions received from the government, presuming that the latter have complied with all the requirements envisaged by
controls.control_description:
Whenever such excess/wrongful pension payment is made due to Government
attributed errors, the banks shall make recoveries based on the instructions received from
the Government, presuming that the latter have complied with all the requirements
envisaged by law, including court orders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make recoveries based on the instructions received from the government, presuming that the latter have complied with all the requirements envisaged by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the bank and the same should be kept in its records
controls.control_description:
However, if recovery is to be made from the
account balance of a pensioner (as distinguished from the amount payable as pension in
a month), express authorization from the customer should be made available to the bank
and the same should be kept in its records.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the bank and the same should be kept in its records

controls.control_objective: To ensure take them up with the respective government, without reference to the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
If doubts arise regarding the instructions
issued by the Government, the banks shall take them up with the respective Government,
without reference to the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take them up with the respective government, without reference to the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure categorize such pensioners as under:
controls.control_description:
In order to take care of problems/ difficulties faced by sick and disabled pensioners
in withdrawal of pension / family pension, ABs shall categorize such pensioners as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to categorize such pensioners as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the procedure as under:
controls.control_description:
With a view to enabling such old/ sick/ incapacitated pensioners to operate their
accounts, ABs shall follow the procedure as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the procedure as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified by two independent witnesses known to the bank, one of whom should be a responsible bank official
controls.control_description:
(a) Wherever thumb or toe impression of the old/ sick pensioner is obtained, it
should be identified by two independent witnesses known to the bank, one of
whom should be a responsible bank official
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified by two independent witnesses known to the bank, one of whom should be a responsible bank official

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified by two independent witnesses, one of whom should be a responsible bank official
controls.control_description:
(b) Where the pensioner cannot even put his/ her thumb/ toe impression and also
is unable to be physically present in the bank, a mark can be obtained on the
cheque/ withdrawal form, which should be identified by two independent
witnesses, one of whom should be a responsible bank official
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified by two independent witnesses, one of whom should be a responsible bank official

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be asked to indicate to the bank as to who would withdraw the amount from the bank on the basis of cheque / withdrawal form as obtained above and
controls.control_description:
(c) The pensioner may also be asked to indicate to the bank as to who would
withdraw the amount from the bank on the basis of cheque / withdrawal form as
obtained above and that person should be identified by two independent
witnesses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be asked to indicate to the bank as to who would withdraw the amount from the bank on the basis of cheque / withdrawal form as obtained above and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be asked to furnish his signature to the bank
controls.control_description:
The person who would be actually drawing the money from the bank
should be asked to furnish his signature to the bank
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be asked to furnish his signature to the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be drawn to the supreme court judgement reported in air 1950 - supreme court, 265, that there must be physical contact between the person who is to si
controls.control_description:
(d) In case the pensioner cannot sign due to loss of both hands, reference may be
drawn to the Supreme Court judgement reported in AIR 1950 - Supreme Court,
265, that there must be physical contact between the person who is to sign and
the signature can be by means of a mark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be drawn to the supreme court judgement reported in air 1950 - supreme court, 265, that there must be physical contact between the person who is to si

controls.control_objective: To ensure be from the same bank, preferably from the same branch
controls.control_description:
The responsible bank official referred to in Para 11(a) and 11(b), should be from the same
bank, preferably from the same branch, where the pensioner is having his/ her pension
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be from the same bank, preferably from the same branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure display the instructions issued in this regard on their notice board so that sick and disabled pensioners could make full use of these facilities
controls.control_description:
The ABs' branches should display the instructions issued in this regard on their notice
board so that sick and disabled pensioners could make full use of these facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display the instructions issued in this regard on their notice board so that sick and disabled pensioners could make full use of these facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly implement the instructions issued by rbi regarding the facilities to be provided to the sick and disabled persons, sensitise staff members in
controls.control_description:
ABs
shall strictly implement the instructions issued by RBI regarding the facilities to be
provided to the sick and disabled persons, sensitise staff members in the matter, and
refer to the Frequently Asked Question (FAQs) on 'Payment of Pension to Government
Pensioners' hosted on our website (www.rbi.org.in) in case of any doubt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly implement the instructions issued by rbi regarding the facilities to be provided to the sick and disabled persons, sensitise staff members in

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit reimbursement claims to central accounts section (cas), nagpur, rbi / government banking divisions (gbds) of respective regional offices (ros)
controls.control_description:
Link branches of ABs shall submit reimbursement claims to Central Accounts Section
(CAS), Nagpur, RBI / Government Banking Divisions (GBDs) of respective Regional
Offices (ROs) for CG / SG pension payments, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit reimbursement claims to central accounts section (cas), nagpur, rbi / government banking divisions (gbds) of respective regional offices (ros)

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily issue duly signed acknowledgements against receipt of life certificate
controls.control_description:
In order to alleviate the hardships faced by pensioners, ABs shall mandatorily issue
duly signed acknowledgements against receipt of life certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandatorily issue duly signed acknowledgements against receipt of life certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider updating the receipt of life certificates in their core banking solution (cbs) and issue a system-generated acknowledgement which would
controls.control_description:
ABs shall also consider
updating the receipt of life certificates in their Core Banking Solution (CBS) and issue a
system-generated acknowledgement which would serve the twin purpose of
acknowledgement as well as real-time-updation of records.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also consider updating the receipt of life certificates in their core banking solution (cbs) and issue a system-generated acknowledgement which would

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide digital acknowledgment in respect of digital life certificate submitted by the pensioner
controls.control_description:
ABs shall provide digital
acknowledgment in respect of digital life certificate submitted by the pensioner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide digital acknowledgment in respect of digital life certificate submitted by the pensioner

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the orders contained in office memorandum dated november 14, 2014, issued by the cpao forwarded to all abs and sgs / union territories (uts)
controls.control_description:
ABs shall refer to the orders
contained in Office Memorandum dated November 14, 2014, issued by the CPAO
forwarded to all ABs and SGs / Union Territories (UTs), as amended from time-to-time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the orders contained in office memorandum dated november 14, 2014, issued by the cpao forwarded to all abs and sgs / union territories (uts)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be referred
controls.control_description:
Similar amendments in the pension regulations of various CG Ministries (e.g., Ministry of
Railways, Department of Posts, etc.) shall also be referred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be referred

controls.control_objective: To ensure take necessary action to implement the scheme and issue necessary instructions to all their branches concerned and dealing staff
controls.control_description:
All ABs disbursing
Government pension shall take necessary action to implement the scheme and issue
necessary instructions to all their branches concerned and dealing staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take necessary action to implement the scheme and issue necessary instructions to all their branches concerned and dealing staff

controls.control_objective: To ensure work towards creating awareness about 'jeevan pramaan' among their pensioner- customers through their branches, websites and other means
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall
work towards creating awareness about 'Jeevan Pramaan' among their pensioner-
customers through their branches, websites and other means.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work towards creating awareness about 'jeevan pramaan' among their pensioner- customers through their branches, websites and other means

controls.control_objective: To ensure also suitably amend the faqs on pension payments posted on their respective websites and provide a link to the website of 'jeevan pramaan
controls.control_description:
ABs shall also suitably
amend the FAQs on pension payments posted on their respective websites and provide
a link to the website of 'Jeevan Pramaan.'
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also suitably amend the faqs on pension payments posted on their respective websites and provide a link to the website of 'jeevan pramaan

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be the point of referral for the pensioner
controls.control_description:
The AB branch that maintains pension accounts and also calculates pension should
continue to be the point of referral for the pensioner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be the point of referral for the pensioner

controls.control_objective: To ensure guide and assist the pensioners in all their dealings with the ab
controls.control_description:
All branches maintaining pension accounts should guide and assist the pensioners
in all their dealings with the AB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to guide and assist the pensioners in all their dealings with the ab

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide considerate and sympathetic customer service to the pensioners, especially to those pensioners who are of old age
controls.control_description:
All ABs disbursing pension shall provide considerate and sympathetic customer
service to the pensioners, especially to those pensioners who are of old age.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide considerate and sympathetic customer service to the pensioners, especially to those pensioners who are of old age

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue instructions to their dealing branches to adhere to the recommendations of the prabhakar rao committee relating to pension payments
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall issue instructions to their dealing branches to adhere to the
recommendations of the Prabhakar Rao Committee relating to pension payments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue instructions to their dealing branches to adhere to the recommendations of the prabhakar rao committee relating to pension payments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the inspecting officers/ auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items given in annex 1
controls.control_description:
A
checklist shall be provided to the inspecting officers/ auditors, which shall, at a minimum,
include the illustrative items given in Annex 1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the inspecting officers/ auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items given in annex 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure also instruct their internal auditors/ inspectors to comment on the quality of customer service offered to the pensioners in their reports, which shou
controls.control_description:
ABs shall also instruct their internal
auditors/ inspectors to comment on the quality of customer service offered to the
pensioners in their reports, which should be made available to RBI's inspecting officers,
as and when they visit the branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also instruct their internal auditors/ inspectors to comment on the quality of customer service offered to the pensioners in their reports, which shou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a forum for regular interaction and settlement of grievances
controls.control_description:
To provide hassle free service to the pensioners, there should be a forum for regular
interaction and settlement of grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a forum for regular interaction and settlement of grievances

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint one/two nos at each region/zone for monitoring the resolution of grievances of pensioners on regular basis and the general manager (gm) / chie
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, ABs should appoint one/two NOs
at each Region/Zone for monitoring the resolution of grievances of pensioners on
regular basis and the General Manager (GM) / Chief General Manager (CGM)
<image>
concerned should review the position at monthly intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint one/two nos at each region/zone for monitoring the resolution of grievances of pensioners on regular basis and the general manager (gm) / chie

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designated nos for pension related complaints who should be (a) easily accessible to pensioners, and (b) they should hold regular meetings at diffe
controls.control_description:
At locations outside the Centralised Pension Processing Centre (CPPCs), there
should be designated NOs for pension related complaints who should be (a) easily
accessible to pensioners, and (b) they should hold regular meetings at different
locations in their jurisdiction on the lines of Pension Adalat.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designated nos for pension related complaints who should be (a) easily accessible to pensioners, and (b) they should hold regular meetings at diffe

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish toll-free dedicated pension line manned by trained persons with access to the database to answer queries, note down and redress complaints
controls.control_description:
Each AB should establish
toll-free dedicated pension line manned by trained persons with access to the database
to answer queries, note down and redress complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish toll-free dedicated pension line manned by trained persons with access to the database to answer queries, note down and redress complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on opening of a new account for credit of family pension after death of the pensioner
controls.control_description:
ABs shall not insist on opening of a new account for credit of family pension after
death of the pensioner, if the spouse (family pensioner) opts for an existing joint account
for credit of family pension.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on opening of a new account for credit of family pension after death of the pensioner

controls.control_objective: To ensure record the ppo numbers in all the pension passbooks of pensioners/family pensioners in order to alleviate the difficulties reported by pensioners/ fam
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall record the PPO numbers in all the pension passbooks of
pensioners/family pensioners in order to alleviate the difficulties reported by pensioners/
family pensioners to get duplicate PPO in the instances of (a) missing original PPO, (b)
transfer of pension account from one bank/ branch to another bank/ branch, and (c)
commencement of family pension to spouse or dependent children after the death of
the pensioner, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record the ppo numbers in all the pension passbooks of pensioners/family pensioners in order to alleviate the difficulties reported by pensioners/ fam

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to the pensioners at (a) commencement of pension, and (b) whenever there is a change in the quantum of pension
controls.control_description:
Pension slips should be issued to the pensioners at (a) commencement of pension,
and (b) whenever there is a change in the quantum of pension.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to the pensioners at (a) commencement of pension, and (b) whenever there is a change in the quantum of pension

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a mechanism to immediately obtain copies of pension orders from the ppas so that the pensioners get benefits announced by governments in the succ
controls.control_description:
To ensure timely disbursal of revised pension and arrears, ABs should have a
mechanism to immediately obtain copies of pension orders from the PPAs so that the
pensioners get benefits announced by Governments in the succeeding month's pension
<image>
payment itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a mechanism to immediately obtain copies of pension orders from the ppas so that the pensioners get benefits announced by governments in the succ

controls.control_objective: To ensure also place the arithmetic and other details about pension calculations on the web, to be made available to the pensioners through the net or at the br
controls.control_description:
ABs shall also place the arithmetic and other details about pension
calculations on the web, to be made available to the pensioners through the net or at
the branches at periodic intervals, as deemed necessary, and to make sufficient
advertisement about such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also place the arithmetic and other details about pension calculations on the web, to be made available to the pensioners through the net or at the br

controls.control_objective: To ensure compensate the pensioner for delay in crediting pension/ arrears thereof at a fixed interest rate of 8 per cent per annum for the period of delay after the due date of payment
controls.control_description:
ABs should compensate the pensioner for delay in crediting pension/ arrears thereof
at a fixed interest rate of 8 per cent per annum for the period of delay after the due date
of payment, if the delay is on account of error on part of the AB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compensate the pensioner for delay in crediting pension/ arrears thereof at a fixed interest rate of 8 per cent per annum for the period of delay after the due date of payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the pensioner's account automatically, without any claim from the pensioner
controls.control_description:
Further, the
compensation shall be credited to the pensioner's account automatically, without any
claim from the pensioner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the pensioner's account automatically, without any claim from the pensioner

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the
repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess branch performance in servicing pensioner customers
controls.control_description:
Annex I
Checklist relating to Government Business (pension related) for internal/
concurrent audit (Illustrative)
Internal inspections should assess branch performance in servicing pensioner
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess branch performance in servicing pensioner customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured:
controls.control_description: In this regard, the following, among others, shall be ensured:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches
controls.control_description:
A specific questionnaire covering all aspects of pension payment shall be devised
for use during inspection of pension paying branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure also, during inspections, call up pensioners at random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services
controls.control_description:
Inspecting officers shall also, during inspections, call up pensioners at random and
enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also, during inspections, call up pensioners at random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given by banks to internal auditors/inspectors in order to adhere to the recommendations of the prabhakar rao committee, constituted by the governm
controls.control_description:
A detailed checklist relating to pension payments/Government business shall be
given by banks to internal auditors/inspectors in order to adhere to the
recommendations of the Prabhakar Rao Committee, constituted by the
Government of India, relating to pension payments/Government business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given by banks to internal auditors/inspectors in order to adhere to the recommendations of the prabhakar rao committee, constituted by the governm

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately intimated through a written notice
controls.control_description:
As soon as the excess/wrong payment made to a pensioner comes to the notice of the pension disbursing bank, the
pensioner should be immediately intimated through a written notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately intimated through a written notice

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably contain details of excess/wrong payment made, nature of error, proposed recovery method, and opportunity to make representation to the bank
controls.control_description:
The notice should invariably contain details of
excess/wrong payment made, nature of error, proposed recovery method, and opportunity to make representation to the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably contain details of excess/wrong payment made, nature of error, proposed recovery method, and opportunity to make representation to the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated after a defined cut-off period unless: • fraud or misrepresentation by the pensioner is established
controls.control_description:
No recovery shall be initiated after a defined cut-off period unless:
• Fraud or misrepresentation by the pensioner is established.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated after a defined cut-off period unless: • fraud or misrepresentation by the pensioner is established
